message:
chore: audit batch 495 — bytes, process, signal, tcp, distributed

bytes/bytes.rs, bytes_mut.rs: SOUND, invariant maintained.
process.rs: SOUND, no cmd injection, zombie prevention.
signal/signal.rs, graceful.rs: SOUND, notify pattern correct.
net/tcp/split.rs: SOUND, no double-close.
distributed/bridge.rs: SOUND (Phase 0 snapshot limitation noted).
record/region.rs: FIXED — torn read in apply_distributed_snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
